title: NONOS capsule manifest v3
description: Canonical schema for the kernel-facing capsule manifest. Mirrors src/security/capsule_manifest/schema/manifest.rs (CapsuleManifest, schema_version = 3). Hybrid Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 publisher signatures replace the v2 single-Ed25519 signature; publisher identity is referenced by nonos_id_cert_id (BLAKE3 of the publisher cert) rather than an inline pubkey. The kernel decoder in src/security/capsule_manifest/decode is the source of truth.

nonos_id_cert_id.description: Hex-encoded BLAKE3 of the publisher NONOS ID certificate (32 bytes). The kernel looks up the cert by this id, then verifies each publisher_signature against the cert's pinned algorithm pubkeys.

app_namespace.description: Reverse-domain namespace. Participates in capsule_id derivation.

target_triple.description: Target triple of the artifact ELF, e.g. x86_64-nonos-user. The kernel refuses a manifest whose target_triple does not match the running kernel's expected user target.

payload_hash.description: BLAKE3 over the full ELF bytes the kernel will load (32 bytes).

required_caps.description: Hex-encoded u64 mask of capabilities the capsule needs to function. The kernel installs at most these bits when the manifest verifies.

optional_caps.description: Hex-encoded u64 mask of additional caps the capsule may use if granted by policy.

publisher_signatures.description: Hybrid signature set. NONOS_PRODUCTION_POLICY requires both Ed25519 and ML-DSA-65 entries (RequireAll). Each entry signs the canonical wire bytes preceding the signature trailer; the kernel recomputes the signed region via src/security/capsule_manifest/verify/signed_region.rs.

algorithm.description: Maps to crate::crypto::asymmetric::alg_id::AlgId. Only Ed25519 and MlDsa65 are supported by the production verifier today; MlDsa44 / MlDsa87 are reserved.

key_id.description: Hex-encoded 16-byte key id derived from the publisher cert's per-algorithm pubkey.

sig.description: Hex-encoded signature bytes. Length depends on algorithm: Ed25519 = 64 bytes (128 hex chars), ML-DSA-65 = 3309 bytes (6618 hex chars), ML-DSA-44 = 2420 bytes, ML-DSA-87 = 4627 bytes.
